## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant local checks (tests, lint, typecheck)
- [ ] I verified behavior for changed paths
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed

## Risk Review

- [ ] No breaking changes to existing behavior
- [ ] Config/env behavior is unchanged or documented
- [ ] Error handling and logging remain actionable

## Related Issues

Link issues/PRs if applicable.
